generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical thermal incubator system environment"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, HeatbedActuator, FanActuator, RaspberryPi4Controller, PCBComponent, PowerSupplyComponent, AmbientDS18S20Sensor, InternalDS18S20Sensor1, InternalDS18S20Sensor2
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ volume"
]

instance HeatbedActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed controlled via MOSFETs on PCB for ~4A current handling"
]

instance FanActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan operating at 12V or 24V controlled via optocouplers for signal isolation"
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B edge controller handling sensor data acquisition and actuator control"
]

instance PCBComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for current control and signal isolation"
]

instance PowerSupplyComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance AmbientDS18S20Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for ambient temperature measurement (±0.5°C accuracy)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalDS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 1)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
]

instance InternalDS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for internal temperature measurement (position 2)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
]

instance AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AmbientDS18S20Sensor
]

instance InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20Sensor1
]

instance InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20Sensor2
]

instance AmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time ambient temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AmbientTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperature1Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement (position 1) from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature1DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperature2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time internal temperature measurement (position 2) from DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperature2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal energy balance model with two parameters: C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extended thermal model with four parameters: C_air, G_box, C_heater, G_heater"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between physical sensors and DT components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, SimulationPredictionService, OptimizationService
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares calibration of thermal models and simulation-based prediction"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationPredictionService, OptimizationService
]

instance GitHubRepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Open-source GitHub repository for storing and versioning DT code and models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelDevelopmentService
]

instance SimulationPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based temperature prediction using calibrated Model A and Model B for comparative accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictionInsight, ModelComparisonInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature monitoring for safety thresholds and system optimality"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyAlertInsight, OptimalityInsight, HeatbedControlAction, FanControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detection of anomalies or faults in the thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimation of system state based on sensor data and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration and optimization using Scipy for improved model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationParametersInsight
]

instance ModelDevelopmentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model development and iterative refinement based on experimental validation and residual error minimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from Model A and Model B for comparison"
]

instance ModelComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of prediction accuracy between Model A and Model B"
]

instance SafetyAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert when temperature exceeds predefined safety thresholds"
]

instance OptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for optimizing system performance based on real-time data"
]

instance FaultAlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Notification of system faults detected during monitoring"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Estimated current state of the thermal system"
]

instance CalibrationParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated model parameters (e.g., C_air, G_box) used for improved prediction accuracy"
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Refined model parameters and structure based on experimental validation results"
]

instance HeatbedControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed power based on real-time monitoring and model predictions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FanControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of fan speed for optimal temperature control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands to control heatbed and fan (on/off states) are sent from DT components via RabbitMQ to the controller, which executes bang-bang control using parameters like heating duration (H) and waiting duration (C)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server hosting DT components that communicate with the PT via message queues; low-level driver interfaces with hardware, controller executes control logic, and simulation models process data for prediction."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase ('as operated') of the physical system, where the DT continuously monitors and predicts current behavior during deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B validated as more accurate for thermal inertia; temperature uniformity tested with sensor discrepancies up to 7°C (reduced to 6°C with 18V fan); calibration minimizes residual error via least squares optimization."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker using AMQP protocol for data exchange between PT (Raspberry Pi) and DT components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and DT components deployed on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B (on-premises edge device)."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into low-level driver to maintain device safety; bang-bang controller enforces upper/lower temperature limits (UL/LL) to prevent overheating."
]
